title: JustBackup
body:
JustBackup is a MEGA lightweight mod for automatic and manual world backups.

No unnecessary features, no performance impact - it just works.

✨ Features

⏱️ Configurable backup intervals

📦 Maximum backup limit (old backups are removed automatically)

💬 Optional chat messages when a backup is created

🛠️ /forcebackup command for manual backups

⚡ Extremely lightweight - near-zero performance impact

Perfect for:

singleplayer worlds

survival servers

development and testing environments

Install it, configure it once, and forget about backups forever.
